description_long: This object is a sleek, elongated knife or sword with a predominantly black blade that features a series of subtle, undulating curves along its length. The blade is adorned with striking blue accents or patterns that run diagonally across its surface, giving it a modern and somewhat futuristic appearance. The overall form is narrow and tapers to a point at both ends, suggesting a double-edged design. The handle is not distinctly separated from the blade, indicating a monolithic or integrated construction. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with the blue elements providing a visual contrast against the dark base. There are no visible guards, pommels, or decorative engravings beyond the blue markings.
description: A sleek, black double-edged knife or sword with blue diagonal accents and a smooth, integrated handle-blade design.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length, undulating black blade with blue diagonal accents.
description_view_1: Narrow edge-on view highlighting the thinness and blue patterns along the blade.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, mirroring the undulating blade and blue accents.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, again emphasizing the slim profile and blue markings.
attribute_handle_design: integrated, smooth, no visible grip texture or separation
